creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #5)
Thanks for your input. I know this and I have ported some pgsql extensions like databases/pg_dirtyread. I found this port use different distfile for different pgsql version and I can not find any docs about this, so I tried to use the master/slave port.

Anyway I have made this work by putting all distfile info to one distinfo file.Thanks very much!
